description_long: This is a large, rectangular shipping container with a dark blue exterior, showing signs of weathering and rust. The container features corrugated metal sides and top, with prominent white stenciled logos and text, including 'BOLUDA LINES' and a large 'B' emblem. The front end displays a set of double doors with visible locking bars, warning signage, and technical markings such as serial numbers and capacity information. The surface is matte with patches of rust and wear, indicating prolonged outdoor use. The container is constructed primarily from heavy-duty steel, designed for secure storage and transport of goods. Its robust build and standardized form make it suitable for stacking and placement in shipping yards, industrial zones, or urban logistics areas.
description: A weathered blue steel shipping container with white stenciled logos, rust patches, and double doors featuring warning and technical markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors with locking bars, warning label, and technical markings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the 'BOLUDA LINES' logo and extensive rust patches on the corrugated metal.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large 'B' emblem and visible weathering, no doors or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the 'BOLUDA LINES' logo, similar weathering and rust as the other side.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: white stenciled logos and text on sides and top, warning label and technical markings on front doors
attribute_handles_or_grips: locking bars with integrated handles on front doors
